home.title: Book your appointment easy and fast
home.tagline: Choose the service, select the time that fits you best and book securing your spot instantly with a small deposit.
home.locationSubtitle: We are located in the heart of the city. Book your appointment online, come by, and let our professionals take care of the rest.

S01.name: Advised Cut & Grooming
S01.desc: Classic or modern cut with precise beard grooming. Includes washing.

S02.name: VIP Treatment & Relax
S02.desc: Complete experience: cut, hair spa, facial cleaning and courtesy drinks.

S03.name: Express Facial Cleaning
S03.desc: Quick skin treatment to brighten and clean pores before an event.

about.title: Meet our team
about.subtitle: Passionate professionals dedicated to giving you the best service. Meet them below.
about.pilar1Desc: Years of experience guarantee our level of service.
about.pilar2Desc: Attention to detail in every service we offer.
about.pilar3Desc: Transparency and security in booking management.

E01.desc: Specialist in colorimetry, visagism and designer styles.

E02.desc: Over 10 years of experience in classic cuts and traditional grooming.

E03.desc: Expert in skin care and rejuvenating facial treatments.

blog.title: Blog & News

booking.noSlots: No slots available for this day with {{profesional}}.
booking.successMessage: We have received your deposit. Your appointment is now scheduled in our system.
booking.whatsappPrompt: We have sent the details to your email, but if you want to receive your receipt and instructions quickly, send us an automatic WhatsApp.
